selected_important_turn.text: Ok, let me know what you think and we will go from there. I do prefer more food and firewood than water though.
selected_important_turn.why_important: This turn comes right before the opponent explicitly invites you to make an offer. It restates your priorities but passes initiative back to them instead of shaping a concrete deal when momentum and mutual information were fresh.
selected_important_turn.why_improvable_or_worth_amplifying: Saying "let me know" is a missed opportunity: both sides have disclosed compatible preferences (you prefer food/firewood, they prefer water), so this was the moment to propose a concrete, integrative split rather than waiting. The turn is cooperative but weak—it doesn't translate revealed preferences into an actionable trade-off.
selected_important_turn.better_direction: Take the initiative: convert the stated priorities into a small, concrete proposal that leverages the clear trade (e.g., offer to take the bulk of food and firewood in exchange for them taking more water), or at minimum invite them to choose between two specific packages.

expected_effect_on_negotiation.joint_gain: increase — a concrete proposal would enable value‑creating tradeoffs instead of stalling.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.fairness: increase — explicit packages make tradeoffs transparent and easier to balance.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.ease_of_agreement: increase substantially — taking initiative reduces back-and-forth and speeds closure.
expected_effect_on_negotiation.relationship: improve — shows responsiveness and leadership while respecting their preferences.

value2reason.Medium: To be able to cook the food.

value2reason.Low: I brought enough food to last and I'm also on a diet!
value2reason.Medium: I absolutely love campfires, and I always use tons of wood, so I need as much wood as I can get!
value2reason.High: A person can survive without food for a certain period of time, but you can't survive without water for very long.

dialogue.text: What are your preferences?  I always love having a big fire at night when I am camping and I do think water is more important than food.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I like to have a lot of food to keep my energy up, but I might need some firewood to cook that food. I can't wait for my camping trip.🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I love camping also!  Yes, I can see how you would need firewood if you want to cook your food.  So, food is more important to you than water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Yes, I will need a little water to wash that food down with though. Are you going to be needing a lot of water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Yes, I may need more water.  I am on a diet and I don't really cook either!  Hopefully we can work something out here.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: That sounds great. I probably need to go on a diet, but I like my food to much. LOL
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Well, I am pre-diabetic, so I had to do it for my health. I love food, too...especially sugar!  🙂🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Oh, that does change things a lot. Diabetes is a hard disease to have to deal with. So you want more firewood than water? And less food than water?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: Well, I don't know.  I think I would like more water than firewood, but yes less food than water.  I'm a pretty easy going person though! 🙂
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Ok, let me know what you think and we will go from there. I do prefer more food and firewood than water though.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I value food and firewood most, so I’m willing to trade some water for those. How about I take 2 food and 1 firewood, and you take 2 water? That way we both get what we need.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I appreciate the offer, but I need more water than that. How about I take 3 water and 1 firewood, and you take 2 food and 1 firewood? That way I get the water I need, and we both get some firewood.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm happy to adjust. Let's say I take 3 food and 1 firewood, and you take 3 water and 2 firewood. That way, I get the nourishment I need, and you get enough water. What do you think?
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I think that works for me. I’ll take 3 water and 2 firewood, and you can have 3 food and 1 firewood. Let’s confirm that we’re both satisfied with this split.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: I'm glad we found a fair split. Let's confirm: you take 3 water and 2 firewood, and I take 3 food and 1 firewood. That should cover our needs.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1

dialogue.text: I’m happy with this split. Let’s confirm: I take 3 water and 2 firewood, and you take 3 food and 1 firewood. That should work for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_2

dialogue.text: Agreed! Final split: I take 3 food and 1 firewood, you take 3 water and 2 firewood. Safe and satisfying for both of us.
dialogue.speaker: mturk_agent_1
